issues.title: Add ATmega328P seed component
issues.description: Full 28-pin profile for the Arduino MCU — VCC, GND, PB0-PB7, PD0-PD7, PC0-PC6, AVCC, AREF, XTAL1/2, RESET.

issues.title: Add ESP32 seed component
issues.description: Generic ESP32 module profile — GPIO0-39, EN, 3V3, GND, VIN. Note common gotchas: GPIO0 boot strapping, GPIO6-11 connected to flash.

issues.title: Add STM32F103C8T6 seed component
issues.description: "Blue Pill" MCU, 48 pins — PA0-PA15, PB0-PB15, PC13-PC15, PD0/PD1, NRST, BOOT0, VDD, VSS, VDDA.

issues.title: Net labels on schematic
issues.description: Same-name net labels = same electrical net. Enables clean long-distance connections without crossing wires. Add "Label" tool to editor toolbar, prompt for net name on place, render as flag shape.

issues.title: Export schematic to PNG
issues.description: Render the current schematic canvas to a PNG file and trigger browser download. Use offscreen canvas at 2x resolution for sharpness.

issues.title: Export schematic to SVG
issues.description: Generate a clean SVG file from the schematic. Every wire, symbol and label reconstructed as SVG paths/text. Scales to any size for datasheets and documentation.

issues.title: Tag / category filtering in library
issues.description: Add category tags to components (MCU, Power, Motor Driver, Passive, Transistor, etc.) and show filter chips above the library list so the user can narrow by type.

issues.title: Import profile from JSON
issues.description: Button on the library sidebar to import a profile.json file directly — useful for sharing component profiles between users or restoring from backup.

issues.title: AI circuit generator (Phase 4)
issues.description: Describe a circuit in plain text → AI reads component profiles from library → generates full schematic with wiring and justification for every connection.

issues.title: Cross-component compatibility checks
issues.description: After schematic is drawn, check: voltage compatibility (5V GPIO → 3.3V input = ERROR), current limits, logic level mismatches, open-drain outputs without pull-up.

issues.title: Power budget calculator
issues.description: Sum current draw from all placed components. Show per-rail breakdown table: Supply | Draw | Headroom | Status. Flag rails with <20% headroom.

issues.title: Safety report (DRC)
issues.description: Design Rule Check — scan the schematic for floating pins, missing decoupling caps, voltage rail conflicts, and unconnected required passives. Show ERRORS / WARNINGS / OK summary.
